HomePage.eyebrow: A scalable appointment platform for Egypt
HomePage.headline: The initial scaffold is ready to grow from clinics into any service category later.
HomePage.body: This first interface connects the homepage to the API health check and establishes the base for localization, documentation, and a mobile-first experience.
HomePage.statusBody: The frontend is checking the backend health endpoint to confirm the initial application wiring is working.

cards.backendBody: FastAPI with Motor and a MongoDB startup ping when connection details are configured.
cards.frontendBody: Next.js 14 with Tailwind, next-intl, and a mobile-first shell.
cards.docsBody: Decisions, tasks, and forward plans are stored in the repository so work does not depend on chat history.
